message:
fix: address unaddressed Copilot review comments from 48h merged PRs (#9739)

Fixes surfaced by Copilot reviews on PRs merged in the last 48 hours.

Go fixes:
- sod/engine.go: ByConflictType now counts violations (not rules) by
  looking up each violation's rule conflict type via RuleID (#9692)
- reports/pdf.go: font resource names in buildPageStream now use /F1//F2
  matching the page /Resources dict instead of object numbers /F3//F4,
  which caused blank text in compliant PDF readers (#9685)
- handlers/youtube.go: move resp.Body.Close() out of defer inside retry
  loop; close explicitly before continue to avoid leaking bodies (#9573)
- handlers/hipaa_test.go: add defer resp.Body.Close() to all four test
  cases (#9695)
- handlers/benchmarks.go: reset h.lastReq to zero on ctx.Done() so a
  cancelled throttle reservation does not poison the shared state and
  block subsequent requests (#9554)
- netlify/acmm-badge.mts: add Vary: Origin header when a specific origin
  is set; suppress stale-while-revalidate on error responses (#9566)

TypeScript/React fixes:
- IframeEmbed.tsx: guard auto-refresh useEffect with isDemoMode; replace
  hardcoded English demo-mode string with i18n t() call (#9572)
- NotFound.tsx: fix feature-request URL (template .yaml, kind/feature
  label); wrap animations in motion-safe: to respect prefers-reduced-
  motion (#9684)
- ChangeControlAudit.tsx: add LOW-MEDIUM tier (20-39) to risk label so
  thresholds match riskColor(); add aria-label + type="button" to
  refresh button (#9691)
- SegregationOfDuties.tsx: wrap fetchData in useCallback and add to
  useEffect deps to satisfy exhaustive-deps; add missing Low option to
  severity filter; add aria-label + type="button" to refresh button
  (#9692)
- handlers.ts (MSW): fix STIG benchmark demo data status from 'current'
  to 'compliant' to match STIGDashboard render condition (#9716)
- ResourceUsage.tsx: replace hardcoded English aria-label with t() call
  (#9723)
- GPUNamespaceAllocations.tsx: replace hardcoded English aria-label with
  t() call using namespace interpolation (#9723)
- useACMMStats.ts: move detectedSet derivation inside useCallback body so
  the closure always uses the current value; remove detectedSet from
  outer scope to avoid stale-closure bugs (#9554)
- missions/browser/helpers.ts: apply same lowercase/sanitize
  normalization to the mission.name fast-path in getMissionSlug (#9706)
- locales/en/cards.json: add missing i18n keys for iframeEmbed,
  resourceUsage, and gpuNamespaceAllocations

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

@@ -118,7 +118,7 @@ export function ChangeControlAuditContent() {

SOX/PCI-compliant change tracking with approval workflows

- + {summary && ( @@ -132,7 +132,7 @@ export function ChangeControlAuditContent() {

{summary.risk_score}

- {summary.risk_score >= 70 ? 'HIGH' : summary.risk_score >= 40 ? 'MEDIUM' : 'LOW'}/100 + {summary.risk_score >= 70 ? 'HIGH' : summary.risk_score >= 40 ? 'MEDIUM' : summary.risk_score >= 20 ? 'LOW-MEDIUM' : 'LOW'}/100

@@ -10,7 +10,15 @@ import type { TreeNode } from './types'
  *   3. Slugified title (lowercase, non-alphanum → hyphens, dedupe, trim)
  */
 export function getMissionSlug(mission: MissionExport): string {
-  if (mission.name) return mission.name
+  if (mission.name) {
+    // Normalize the name field the same way as the title-based fallback to
+    // ensure consistent, URL-safe slugs (lowercase, non-alphanum → hyphens).
+    return mission.name
+      .toLowerCase()
+      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-')
+      .replace(/-+/g, '-')
+      .replace(/^-|-$/g, '')
+  }
   if (mission.missionClass === 'install' && mission.cncfProject) {
     return `install-${mission.cncfProject.toLowerCase()}`
   }
